title: complete
content:
people who very clearly don't see themself very clearly. their private life degrades into performance. ther







can't tell the taste on your tongue

cold wind can't smell where it's from



they are

title: dancing inc
content:
noose ended strings,

descended to the ground,

and hooked around loose limbs.

deprived of gravity it warps things,

a corpse revived with the lift of dirty forks.

sings like a unison of 34 bjorks

heart burn still stings,

and brings parasitical storks to wings

the pill's trip was grim

just saw wide eyed grins,

ovoid pupils void of quadruples

pleasing erasure that flowed deeper into

the reaper feasting on sowed sins

bleaching bins to preserve the perverse, terrier mode

alchemising tissue into tins for a heavier load





noose ended strings,

descended to the ground,

and hooked around loose limbs.

deprived of gravity it warps,

with the lift of dirty forks,

like a unison of 34 bjorks it sings

the birth of an undead corpse.

metal rings and ching chings

but the heart burn still stings,

and brings parasitic storks to wings.

the pill's trip was of grim nature

just saw wide eyed grins claw at

ovoid pupils void of quadruples

pleasing erasure that lied and flowed the tide deeper bellow the fins

the reaper feasting on sowed sins

bleaching bins to preserve the perverse, terrier mode

alchemising tissue into tins for a heavier load





for them it was nothing

anger spreaded by proxy

halucinatory doxing

feathers ruffling
path: writing / free writing / poetry / complete / dancing inc

title: faulty cables
content:
faulty cables,
tools we can't handle,
tennis tables,
right angle.
corporate claw,
from yams to yaml,
lip took the last sip
from the camel's paw,
tension in the jaw,
elastic resistance
to binary law.


flooded with fear
fresh air trapped
in bubbles of beer
path: writing / free writing / poetry / complete / faulty cables

title: trust
content:
all i trust is disgust

and the freedom monger's uncontrollable lust

leaves of lettuce enshrined in moldable dust

ghosts that you will never bust

red flag that you sussed, that are everywhere and not worthy of being fussed

living corpse dancey for the nazi

reap what you sow

deep side burrow under a surface of snow

the reaper grim bypassing the know

requires intentional glow

even the silent wind blow
path: writing / free writing / poetry / complete / trust

path: writing / free writing / poetry / complete / dilating dimensions

title: shrieked
content:
shrieked when he shrunk
from the axe to the trunk
the big dick of the monk
path: writing / free writing / poetry / complete / shrieked

title: drying rack
content:
the drying rack floods
fear into the ear drums
monitors themselves
head in the clouds
mechanical here-comes
path: writing / free writing / poetry / complete / drying rack

title: cases
content:
cases of nuts,
brief and injust

title: denial style
content:
the best denial
is the one in style
path: writing / free writing / poetry / complete / denial style

title: fibonacci face
content:
faust ticks boxes into perimetry
as the alien licks shadows of the symmetry
faced to shine patchy
before blinding grace's fibonacci
path: writing / free writing / poetry / complete / fibonacci face

title: psychological loots
content:
the iris shoots
alien fruits
at bubbly boots
to help them ascend…
their roots.
psychological loots
cut ties into suits
bands sling tributes
wrapped by denial
to wring into a sap that's in style
path: writing / free writing / poetry / complete / psychological loots

title: lost in the mirror
content:
it's finding yourself
lost in the mirror
when the structure revs a gear
that sings your ear to the shelf
the elf winding bind drifts near
before indicating a kind
of professional steer
across the dead feet of a cardboard crowd's cheer
grinding to a cult
cutting you off from the rear
leaping back to the year
you forgot to toss for a 2 sided sear
when your weeping flooded you with fear
and trapped fresh air into bubbles of beer
path: writing / free writing / poetry / complete / lost in the mirror
